expectedClassifications.notes: useState stays in provider for UI state

useQuery emitted from TeamProvider (component) but not from useTeamData (hook definition). The react-inventory tool does not emit HOOK_CALL for hooks inside hook definitions. Correctly flagged as dropped.
useFetchApi emitted from TeamProvider (component) but not from useTeamData (hook definition). Same observer limitation as useQuery.
fetchApi call exists in both before (provider) and after (hook). Evidence url is the full call expression, not just the path.
